detail.description: Javier Báez singles on a line drive to left fielder Brandon Lockridge.
Javier Báez singles on a fly ball to right fielder Sal Frelick.

Royals challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: Javier Báez doubles (4) on a line drive to right fielder Jac Caglianone. Zach McKinstry out at home on the throw, right fielder Jac Caglianone to second baseman Michael Massey to catcher Salvador Perez. Javier Báez to 3rd.
Javier Báez singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Jakob Marsee. Spencer Torkelson scores. Zach McKinstry to 3rd. Javier Báez to 2nd.
Javier Báez homers (1) on a line drive to left field.
Javier Báez singles on a ground ball to left fielder José Fermín. Parker Meadows scores.
Javier Báez singles on a line drive to center fielder Victor Scott II.
Javier Báez doubles (3) on a sharp fly ball to center fielder Byron Buxton.
Javier Báez singles on a fly ball to center fielder Byron Buxton. Zach McKinstry to 2nd.
Javier Báez doubles (2) on a line drive to right fielder Matt Wallner.
Javier Báez singles on a ground ball to left fielder Austin Martin.
Javier Báez doubles (1) on a line drive to left fielder Austin Martin.
Javier Báez singles on a ground ball to center fielder Byron Buxton.
Javier Báez singles on a line drive to left fielder Roman Anthony.
Javier Báez singles on a line drive to left fielder Roman Anthony.
Javier Báez doubles (5) on a fly ball to left fielder Roman Anthony. Wenceel Pérez to 3rd.
Javier Báez singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Wilyer Abreu.
Javier Báez singles on a ground ball to right fielder Corbin Carroll. Dillon Dingler scores.
Javier Báez homers (2) on a fly ball to center field.
Javier Báez singles on a ground ball to center fielder Jackson Merrill.
